step_summary.title: Summary & Application
step_summary.subtitle: Please review your details and confirm the conditions.
step_summary.start_date_description: When would you like to start your work at gingr.ch?
step_summary.salary_step_1_text: Your income is divided by the standardized hourly rate of CHF 200. The result is your working hours.
step_summary.salary_step_2_text: Additional services are recorded under employment law as a ‘bonus’ and added to your working hours.
step_summary.salary_step_3_text: Expenses are billed separately and are not included in salary calculation.
step_summary.salary_step_4_text: Statutory social insurance contributions, the monthly QUITT fee of CHF 50, and the Gingr service fee are deducted from the gross salary.
step_summary.salary_info_text: The standardized hourly rate of CHF 200 is used to convert the income you generate on gingr.ch into working hours. This enables legally compliant payroll processing regardless of your individual pricing models on the platform.
step_summary.net_salary_intro: Your net salary is made up of:
step_summary.consent_text: I have carefully reviewed all information and agree with the calculation method shown as well as the conditions of the employment relationship.
step_self_employed_summary.title: Summary & Application
step_self_employed_summary.subtitle: Please review your details and submit your application.
step_core_data_prefilled.title: Your personal details
step_core_data_prefilled.subtitle: Your basic data was imported directly from gingr.ch. Please complete your address and confirm the information.
